data.title: Prototype: columns layout (Open Metropolitan chunked 2-col canvas)

data.body: Open Metropolitan-inspired layout. Chunked 2-column masonry on a pannable infinite canvas. Each chunk is a tile containing ~6 images in 2 columns. Chunks tile infinitely in 2D. Virtualized rendering (only visible chunks). Drag to navigate, no traditional scroll. Reference: openmetropolitan.com. Switchable via ?layout=columns.

data.reason: User decided to keep only scatter and masonry layouts

provenance.reason: User decided to keep only scatter and masonry layouts
